```
    private static int getInt(final byte[] buffer, final int idx) {
        return ((buffer[idx] & 0xff))
                | ((buffer[idx + 1] & 0xff) << 8)
                | ((buffer[idx + 2] & 0xff) << 16)
                | ((buffer[idx + 3] & 0xff) << 24);
    }
```
